title: Bless of Crash Bandicoot
description: A mod that adds a biome and some mobs. You can craft some new items and eat some Wumpa. Wumpa Dream is the dream biome for you. No inevitable hostile mobs. End Cities spawn. Plains is now way more harder. All of it with one mod!
body:
##  Bless of Crash Bandicoot

**PLEASE READ**

**NOT ALLOWED TO BE REUPLOADED**

**IF YOU SEE ONE AVOID IT AND REPORT IT TO ME**

**ALWAYS PLAY IN SINGLE BIOME SET TO WUMPA DREAM**

**WIP**

**CEASED**

**(CURSEFORGE: https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/bless-of-crash-bandicoot)**

**(PLANET MINECRAFT) : https://www.planetminecraft.com/mod/bless-of-crash-bandicoot)**

**(MCCREATOR) : https://mcreator.net/modification/102492/bless-crash-bandicoot**

---

***Bless of Crash Bandicoot is a mod who will affect the world a lot soon***

---

*Biomes:*

Wumpa Dream: It's a biome full of wumpa blocks to eat

Test Biome: It has all the mobs of this mod and is only in The Test Dimension

---

*Items:*

Wumpa Launcher: It's a powerful weapon that deals lots of damage. his uses is low

Wumpa: It's a not so bad food

Aku Aku: It cures your hunger

Angry Aku Aku: Same as Wumpa Launcher but OP

Fur: A useless item

---

*Plants:*

Wumpa Plant: It's a just a plant that can crafted into Wumpas

---

*Blocks:*

Wumpa Block: It's a block that can be crafted using 9 wumpa (Do not do it) and breaked into 8 wumpa

Test TNT: Creative thing that booms himself and drops itself

---

*Mobs:*

Painting Enemy: It's a powerful unused enemy

Tribeman: It's a neutral bit powerful enemy

Papu Papu: It's a powerful enemy

Crash Bandicoot: It's a fast passive mob

Coco Bandicoot: Same as Crash Bandicoot but less health

Crunch Bandicoot: It's a powerful and tough neutral mob

Tawna Bandicoot: Same as Crash Bandicoot but less health

Buffed Papu Papu: Same as Papu Papu but more powerful

Monkey: A mob that drops fur and is a neutral mob

---

*Commands:*

/wumpatime: True fun

---

*Dimensions:*

The Test Dimension: It has a portal built with spawn egg boss blocks (only in creative mode) and ignited with a item with the old texture of Wumpa Launcher. It has two biomes. Wumpa Dream and Test Biome. It has nether like world gen

---

Credit to the original creators of Crash Bandicoot for the idea and MCreator for helping creating the mod

You are allowed to add this mod into your modpack

---

-- From the Papu Papu Mod --

Mobs:

Tribeman: They are wandering group things that attack players at night. Be careful.

Tribecommander: They are tribemen but more powerful. Not spawning naturally

Papu Papu: They are very powerful. They will drain your health fast. Not spawning naturally

Created by MCreator and credit to the original creators of skins used in this mod

How to install it.

Step 1: Install Forge (if you did not do it)

Step 2: Put the mod into the mods folder

Step 3: Launch Minecraft

Step 4: Enjoy your mod
